name: Using AI to Write Tweets with Synup Social
body_para:
At this point, it’s not a question of if businesses will use AI to help facilitate their content, but how they’ll use AI as a part of their content and social media strategy. When it comes to social media platforms like Twitter, using AI to write tweets saves hours of brainstorming, trend-researching, and planning. That’s why we built an AI-powered content generator directly into Synup Social - so you can write AI-generated tweets directly on the platform.

Directly on the Synup Social Dashboard, we show you your best posts and an overview of content ideas (these are pulled from the “Ideas” tab, which we’ll cover in a minute).

‍

It looks like two of our tweets got a decent amount of traction. Clicking “Repost” will take you to the post editor, where you can remix or repost your tweet! 

‍

The “Auto-Generate Content” button will recreate your original tweet - with a twist. Customize your new tweet by choosing the length and tone. Remember, the more you use the AI, the more it will learn your brand-specific voice. If you don’t like the results, you can always edit and tweak the AI-generated tweets before publishing.

‍

There are a few more ways to write AI-generated tweets with Synup Social. If you’re short on inspiration and want to create something new, head to the “Ideas” tab. 

‍

On the Ideas tab, you can immediately see what’s trending on Twitter. You can see what competitors are posting, check out new content under your brand hashtags, and browse other posts in your vertical. In our case, we’re keen on local and digital marketing news. From SEO to #localmarketing, it’s incredibly easy to see industry trends at-a-glance. 

‍

If you like what you see, clicking “Create AI Post” will remix the content to make it more specific to your brand - just like what we did above with our old post.

Further down on the Ideas page, you can get inspired by the days of the year. While Eat Brussel Sprouts Day might not be applicable to Synup, a café or office supply store would definitely want to jump on the bandwagon and create posts for National Hot Chocolate Day and Scotch Tape Day, respectively. It never hurts to check! There are days for everything you could think of.

‍

As before, clicking on “Create AI Post” will bring you to the post creator to help you remix these special days into brand-specific tweets!

‍

We also keep an extensive list of month-long observances. If you don’t know what to say about Ginuary, clicking “Create AI Post” will help you put your brand’s spin on the topic.

‍

If you already have an idea for a tweet, you can use our AI to change the tone or add onto your idea.

‍

From there, you can change the tone and length of your tweet. The AI-assisted content generator can write tweets that are creative, confident, subtle, sophisticated, or quirky. And don’t forget that the more you use the tool, the more the AI will match your brand voice.

‍

Here, the AI helped us elaborate on our initial idea.

‍

Using AI to help write your tweets saves you time and prevents writers’ block.

‍

Try out Synup Social’s AI-powered content generator to see your production and engagement soar!

‍
use_case_summary: And for social media users, AI tools are changing the game.

seo.title: Using AI to Write Tweets that Stick
seo.description: Can AI make you go viral on Twitter? We say yes. Here's how to write tweets with AI that will transform your social media strategy for the better.
